note: READ primaries + WRITE statements × 3 dialects × SKIP/IN edge cases — static makeSQL render golden (byte-true to the original builders).

vectors.name: Feed: status present + limit
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = ? AND status = ? AND created_at >= ? ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT ?

vectors.name: Feed: status null → SKIP drop, coalesce default limit
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = ? AND created_at >= ? ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT ?

vectors.name: ByIds: IN-list single-JSON param
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, title FROM posts WHERE id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?)) ORDER BY id ASC

vectors.name: Create: INSERT + RETURNING (canonical cols)
vectors.expectedSql: INSERT INTO posts (author_id, title) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id, author_id, title

vectors.name: Rename: UPDATE + WHERE + RETURNING
vectors.expectedSql: UPDATE posts SET title = ? WHERE id = ? RETURNING id, title

vectors.name: Remove: DELETE + WHERE + RETURNING
vectors.expectedSql: DELETE FROM posts WHERE id = ? RETURNING id

vectors.name: Feed: status present + limit
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = $1 AND status = $2 AND created_at >= $3 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT $4

vectors.name: Feed: status null → SKIP drop, coalesce default limit
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = $1 AND created_at >= $2 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT $3

vectors.name: ByIds: IN-list single-JSON param
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, title FROM posts WHERE id = ANY($1) ORDER BY id ASC

vectors.expectedSql: INSERT INTO posts (author_id, title) VALUES (?, ?) RETURNING id, author_id, title

vectors.name: Rename: UPDATE + WHERE + RETURNING
vectors.expectedSql: UPDATE posts SET title = ? WHERE id = ? RETURNING id, title

vectors.name: Remove: DELETE + WHERE + RETURNING
vectors.expectedSql: DELETE FROM posts WHERE id = ? RETURNING id

vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = ? AND status = ? AND created_at >= ? ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT ?

vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, author_id, title, status FROM posts WHERE author_id = ? AND created_at >= ? ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT ?

vectors.name: ByIds: IN-list single-JSON param
vectors.expectedSql: SELECT id, title FROM posts WHERE id IN (SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(v) FROM JSON_TABLE(?, '$[*]' COLUMNS(v JSON PATH '$')) jt) ORDER BY id ASC
